ref_text_raw: The Moroccan sultan rebuilt the city as Daru l-Badya and it was given the name Casablanca by Spanish traders who established trading bases there.

text: The Moroccan sultan rebuilt the city as Daru al-Baida and it was given the name Casablanca by Spanish traders who established trading bases there.
